title: Harden Summary residual-risk placeholder gate
outOfScope: Repairing historical Summary files in place

sources.reason: Authoritative Summary validation pipeline; currently validates residualRisks shape but not generated skeleton text.
Existing semantic placeholder gate for Contract v2, used as the policy precedent.
Observed archived Summary containing the generic residual-risk skeleton text.

rawUserRequest: Fix the discovered process gap at its root: Summary residualRisks must reject generic generated skeleton text before Finish/archive, with regression tests; do not start Quick Install or publish a release in this Work Item.

declaredIntent.summary: Harden the Summary evidence gate so generated placeholder residual risks cannot be archived as ready_with_risks.

riskAssessment.reason: A weak Summary gate can allow unsupported readiness claims into immutable archive evidence; the change is confined to validation and tests.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root process correction; no release or destructive operation is in scope.

preReviewWarnings: User confirmed all three required scenarios on 2026-07-24; implementation and Finish must provide actual evidence before archive.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Generated residual-risk skeleton text is rejected before Summary validation succeeds.
scenarioCoverage.reason: Finish-stage regression scenario; user confirmed it must be verified before archive.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Concrete project-specific residual risk is accepted and remains backward-compatible.
scenarioCoverage.reason: Finish-stage regression scenario; user confirmed it must be verified before archive.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: No Quick Install, release, archive rewrite, or bulk worktree deletion occurs in this Work Item.
scenarioCoverage.reason: Explicit Contract boundary; verified by final scope and diff ownership checks.

acceptance: Summary validation rejects residualRisks entries whose detail is a generated skeleton placeholder, while accepting concrete risk detail.
Focused regression tests cover both rejection and acceptance, and the existing Contract placeholder gate remains unchanged.
The Summary and Finish path use the same validator so the rejection occurs before archive creation.
No Quick Install, release, bulk worktree deletion, historical archive rewrite, or budget-only change is included.
guidelines: Keep validation fail-closed and backward-compatible for concrete historical risk evidence.
Keep the fix in the Summary governance validator and focused tests; do not broaden release or worktree scope.

intent.problem: Archived Summary files can pass validation with the generic ai-start residual-risk skeleton text, which weakens the evidence boundary and allows ready_with_risks to be asserted without task-specific risk analysis.
constraints: Do not rewrite historical archive evidence in this Work Item.
Reject only known generated skeleton language, not legitimate project-specific risk descriptions.
Do not start another plan feature or release operation.
intent.rationale: The existing Contract validator already rejects semantic placeholders; applying the same root policy to Summary residual risks closes the observed gap at the shared validation boundary instead of repairing individual archives.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized root process correction before continuing plan execution.
